title: Coryphadenia abnormis

As for its classification, Coryphadenia abnormis is classified as a member of the genus Coryphadenia, which is part of the Zingiberaceae family. The Zingiberaceae family is a large and diverse family of flowering plants, commonly known as the ginger family. Coryphadenia abnormis is a unique species within this family due to its distinct characteristics.
